query: entry point, service layer, data access

matches.fragment:
class NoteService:
    def __init__(self, repo: NoteRepository):   # depends on the port, not the adapter
        self._repo = repo
    async def create(self, title: str, text: str) -> Note:
        note = Note.new(title, text)            # pure domain entity, validates itself
        await self._repo.save(note)
        return note
